insurance: Lost Card Liability: Insurance covers up to INR 10,00,000 for fraudulent usage of lost or stolen cards. Exclusions: Fraudulent transactions authenticated through PIN, negligence, or fraud by known persons are excluded. Claim Process: All necessary documents like customer dispute form, police compliant/FIR copy/Full Passport copy and any other document are required to be submitted to the bank for submission to Insurance within 30 days from the date of disputed transaction. Please contact 24x7 Bank helpline number to initiate the claim procedure

lounge_access: All Olympus cardholders, primary and add-on, are eligible for unlimited domestic and international lounges. The cardholders are eligible for 10 complimentary guest visits per calendar year.
memberships: 1. Priority Pass Membership: Eligibility: Complimentary for both primary and add-on cardholders. Benefits: Unlimited complimentary access to 1500+ international airport lounges per card anniversary year. 10 guest visits allowed per anniversary year at affiliated lounges. Priority Pass membership is linked to the card and will be deactivated if the credit card is blocked . 2. Taj Epicure Membership: Eligibility: Complimentary for primary cardholders of the Axis Bank Olympus Credit Card. Ongoing Benefits: 25% savings on food and beverages (dine-in & takeaway) at participating restaurants across Taj properties for up to 10 persons. 20% off on spa treatments at Jiva Spas across Taj hotels. 25% off on orders via the Qmin app for Taj properties. Exclusive Benefits: 20% savings on the best available rate on rooms/suites at participating Taj hotels, including Taj Palaces and Taj Safaris (up to a maximum of 5 nights). Membership renewal occurs annually if the primary card is active on the card anniversary dateterms-and-conditions-fo
concierge: 8 complimentary domestic airport concierge services in one calendar year. 2 complimentary airport pick-ups/drops every year per primary Olympus credit card holder. To avail the service, call the Concierge Desk - 1800 103 4962 or mail on axisbankconcierge@europ-assistance.in to place the request or can visit the curated experiences page on www.extraordinaryweekends.com.
movies_and_events: Discount on Movie Tickets: INR 650 off on movie tickets when purchased through the BookMyShow website or mobile app. Maximum discount: INR 650 per movie ticket. Valid for a maximum of 2 movie tickets per month. Discount on Non-Movie Tickets: INR 1000 off on non-movie tickets (e.g., events, shows, etc.) booked via BookMyShow. Maximum discount: INR 1000 per non-movie ticket. Valid for a maximum of 2 non-movie tickets per month.
